title: Solo.io Gloo Portal API Key
description: An API key used to authenticate requests to API products exposed through the Gloo developer portal.

id.description: Unique identifier for the API key.

name.description: Name or label for the API key.

apiProductId.description: ID of the API product this key grants access to.

usagePlanId.description: ID of the usage plan associated with this key.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the API key was created.

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the API key.
